creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=255008d84916dfcec497341eb0c2357bbcee5a91

commit 255008d84916dfcec497341eb0c2357bbcee5a91
Author:     Kai Knoblich <kai@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2024-07-13 17:07:56 +0000
Commit:     Kai Knoblich <kai@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-07-13 17:11:36 +0000

    www/py-django-graphiql-debug-toolbar: Fix runtime after f8392fba5cb4

    * Add a workaround for py-django-debug-toolbar 4.4.6 or newer to prevent
      following error [1]:

      [...]
        File "/usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/graphiql_debug_toolbar/middleware.py", line 7, in <module>
            from debug_toolbar.middleware import _HTML_TYPES
        ImportError: cannot import name '_HTML_TYPES' from 'debug_toolbar.middleware' (/usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/debug_toolbar/middleware.py)
      [...]

    * Switch to the PEP517 build framework while I'm here.

    * Bump PORTREVISION due package change.

    PR:             280254 [1]
    Reported by:    Fredrik Eriksson [1]

 www/py-django-graphiql-debug-toolbar/Makefile      |  8 ++++--
 ...ch-graphiql__debug__toolbar_middleware.py (new) | 29 ++++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 35 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
